description.description: Defines the purpose or details of the VPN gateway, such as its intended use or identifying information for easier management.

name.description: Defines the name of the VPN gateway, which must be unique within the project and region.

network.description: Specifies the network where the VPN gateway will be created, must be an existing network in the same project and region.

timeouts.description: Specifies the amount of time to wait for the VPN gateway to be created, updated, or deleted.
